name: io.github.tdries/tableau-graphql-mcp
description: Ask any Tableau lineage question, in any MCP client, through the Tableau Metadata API.

environment_variables.name: TABLEAU_SITE_CONTENT_URL
environment_variables.description: Site content-url slug; empty = Default site (Server only)

environment_variables.name: TABLEAU_PAT_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Personal Access Token secret (the whole string)
